sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n30674" key="e)de/gmhn" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐδέγμην</orth>, <sense id="n30674.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δέχομαι</ref></xr>. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἐδεδέατο</orth>, <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">v.</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">δέω</ref> </xr> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">bind.</tr_> </sense> </entryFree>
